headline: 3 Reasons to Sell VRSK and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Verisk has gotten torched over the last six months - since October 2025, its stock price has dropped 22.8% to $179.30 per share. This might have investors contemplating their next move.

headline: Verisk's Quarterly Earnings Preview: What You Need to Know
summary: Verisk is expected to unveil its first-quarter results later this month, and analysts are projecting a single-digit rise in profit.
